invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.115（支撑位）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.115 (support) or funding rate Z-Score drops below 50% (long pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2800（关键支撑）或融资费率Z-Score回升至-30%以上（空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2800 (key support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -30% (short pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破115（支撑位）或融资费率Z-Score回升至-100%以上（空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 115 (support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -100% (short pressure eases).
